resources.string: Isithonjana sohlelo lokusebenza le-Live Transcribe sizovela kuhlu lwakho lohlelo lokusebenza
Engeza isithonjana sohlelo lokusebenza kuhlu lohlelo lokusebenza?
Idivayisi yakho izodlidliza uma amagama asohlwini ekhulunywa
Engeza amagama angokwezifiso noma imishwana engekho kwisichazamazwi ukuze alotshwe
Ayikwazi ukuloba okwamanje. Zama futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
Amasevisi eGoogle Play kufanele avulwe ku-%1$s.
Faka amasevisi eGoogle Play ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa i-%1$s.
I-%1$s ayikwazanga ukuxhuma kumasevisi eGoogle Play. Sicela ungene ngemvume ku-akhawunti yakho yeGoogle.
I-%1$s ayikwazanga ukuxhuma kumasevisi eGoogle Play. Sicela uzame futhi.
%1$s inenkinga ngamasevisi e-Google Play. Sicela uzame futhi.
I-%1$s ayikwazi ukuqalisa ngoba idivayisi yakho ayiwaseki amasevisi eGoogle Play. Sicela usebenzise idivayisi esekelwe.
Buyekeza amasevisi eGoogle Play ukuze usebenzise i-%1$s.
I-%1$s izotholakala uma ukubuyekezwa kwamasevisi eGoogle Play sekuqedile.
Buyekeza amasevisi eGoogle Play ukuze usebenzise i-%1$s.
Ingalondoloza ukusetshenziswa kwedatha, kodwa ilahlekelwe ikhwalithi.
I-Google ivuma ngokubonga usizo lwenyuvesi yase-Gallaudet
Umsindo wakho cishe usukulungele. Qhubeka nokulondoloza umsindo wakho.
Lo msindo awukwazi ukutholwa kokurekhodiwe. Zama futhi.
Izaziso Zomsindo zizokwazisa lapho lo msindo utholakala
Lo msindo awulondoloziwe okwamanje. Ukuze uwulondoloze, buyela emuva bese uqamba lo msindo.
Uma unezinto eziningi ezikhala ekhaya yakho, ungazifaka njengemisindo engokomuntu ngamunye. Idivayisi yakho izobe isiyakwazi ukuqaphela ngakunye.

"Umsindo wangemuva ungase ube nomthelela endleleni Izaziso Zomsindo eziyithola kahle ngayo imisindo yakho.
Imisindo yangokwezifiso ayithunyelwa noma ayigcinwa yi-Google, ngaphandle uma ukhetha ukuthumela impendulo mayelana nekhwalithi yomsindo."

"Ukuze ufake umsindo, rekhoda ukukhala komshini.
Ukuze uthole ikhwalithi engcono yokurekhoda, thola indawo ethulile ukuze urekhode umsindo wakho. Rekhoda umsindo ukufika kumasekhondi angama-20."
Lokhu kusula okulotshiweyo okulondoloziwe kusuka kudivayisi yakho
Imisindo eyenziwe ngewashi edizayinelwe ukwenza isignali ngesikhathi esithile.
Umsindo weqembu labantu abashaya izandla zabo ukukhuthaza ukuvuma.
Isikhaliswa sendawo esisebenzisa imihlanga evaliwe kusuka kusigcini somoya ngendlela yesikhwama.
Isikhalisi sochungechunge esinokumboza okuzacile okunwebiwe kuzimele noma ukhavithi njenge-resonator, ebizwa ngekhanda.
Amakholi ezokuxhumana kusukela kuzinyoni afaka amakholi enyoni nezingoma.
Imisindo ekhiqizwa ikati, njengokumyawuza nokwenza i-purring.
Isikhaliswa sochungechunge se-lower-pitched bowed, ngamachungechunge amane.
Isikhaliswa se-woodwind esiqukethe i-single-reed mouthpiece, ishubhu eliqondile, kanye ne-flared bell.
Umculo wobuciko ukhiqizwe noma unezimpande zamasiko omculo waseNyakatho ofaka kokubili umculo ophathelene nelitheji kanye nowomhlaba, kusukela cishe kukhulu leminyaka engu-11 ukuya osukwini lamanje.
I-reflex equkethe ukuhogela nokukhipha umoya okuphoqiwe komoya okuvamise ukukhiqizwa izivimbezelo emphinjeni.
Uhlobo lwase-United States lomculo odumile onomsuka wenganekwane, i-Blues kanye nomculo waseNyakatho, ofaka izisetshenziswa ezifana nama-banjo, izigingqi, kanye nama-fiddle.
Umsindo weqembu elikhulu labantu abahlanganyele ndawonye.
Umsindo ohlukile we-\"cock-a-doodle-doo\" owenziwe inkukhu yesilisa.
Isikhalisi somoya seI-Indigenous Australian, ngokuvamile isilinda noma i-conical.
Imisindo ekhiqizwe inja, efaka ukukhonkotha kanye nokubhavumula.
Umsindo wedivayisi obonisa idivayisi ebekwe eduzane nesango lesakhiwo lapho isivakashi singathula ubukhona baso.
Izinhlobo zomculo ezihlela umqondo kanye nezinye izisetshenziswa zogesi ziyimithombo eyinhloko yomsindo.
Idivayisi eyenza umsindo omkhulu osetshenziselwa ukunikezela izexwayiso kubantu abaseduze. I-siren equkethe i-pitch eyodwa eshintsha kahle noma kabi.
Umsindo oshayayo obangelwa ukwakha kokuphazamisa phakathi kwesithupha nomunye umunwe nokukhulula omunye umunwe ngamandla ukuya phansi ukushaya impama ngesivinini esiphezulu.
Imihlanga enezikhaliswa ezikhiqiza imisindo yakhona kusuka ekugelezeni komoya kuya ekuvulekeni.
Isikhalisi esinochungechunge ohamba ngaphezulu kwe-fretboard, uqobo edlalwa ngokushaya uchungechunge ngesandla sesidla ngenkathi yehlisa uchungechunge ngeminwe yesandla sokunxele.
Umculo we-hip hop noma we-rap owenziwe e-United States ngo-1970s nokuqukatha umculo we-stylized rhythmic ohambisana ne-rhythmic kanye nenkulumo ye-rhyming.
Uhlobo lomculo olusuka emiphakathini ye-African American ye-New Orleans phakathi nokwamuva ku-19th nangaphambilini ngo-20th.
Umsindo ocijile wendawo eqinile eshaywayo, ngokuvamile ngaphandle kokulimala ngenhloso, ikakhulukazi nge-knuckles yesandla.
Ukuminyaniswa kwesigqi kwe-diaphragm ngokuphendula ku-stimuli esifana nokukitazwa, noma kusukela kuzindaba ezihlekisayo noma imicabango.
Ukuhlanganiswa kwemisindo nokuthula kwezinto zokuphakama nesigqi okuvamise ukuhambisana nohlobo lobuciko noma umsebenzi wosiko.
Izingoma zefilimu lesi-Hindi ezifakwa kumafilimu e-Bollywood. Izingoma ze-Bollywood ziyisikhombisi ze-motif zesinema ye-Hindi.
Umculo osuka e-Latin America ofaka okuhlukile okubanzi kwezitayela, ezifaka i-son, i-rumba, i-salsa, i-merengue, i-tango, i-samba, ne-bossa nova.
Uhlobo lomculo oluhloselwe ukudala ukukhuthaza kobuciko, ukunethezeka, ne-optimism njengendlela yokuphatha ingcindezi noma ukudala umoya wokuthula.
Isisetshenziswa somculo esidlalwe ngomugqa wokhiye odlalayo awucindezela phansi noma awushaya ngeminwe kanye nezithupha zezandla zombili.
Uhlobo lomculo odumile osuka entshonalanga phakathi no-1950s no-1960s. Izingoma zivame ukuba zifushane kuya ebangeni elimaphakathi ngamakhorasi aphindiwe, amashuni e-melodic, nama.
Umsindo ungumphumela kusuka ekuvaleni kwezindlela zokuphefumula phakathi nokuphefumula ngenkathi ulele.
Indlela yomculo we-1930s-1940s American usebenzisa isigici esiqinile esine-brass noma izikhalisi nokumaphakathi kumathempo asheshayo.
Umsindo wensimbi ephathekayo noma yogesi ehlelwe imiqondo ekhalayo ukuze ibonise ikholi yocingo engenayo.
Umsindo wendlu yangasese eflayisha amanzi nanoma iyiphi indle ngephayiphi lendle.
Isisetshenziswa sephitshi ephezulu sethusi esidlalwa ngokufutha umoya kuzindebe ezicishe zivalwe, okukhiqiza umsindo we-\"buzzing\".
Isiginci esincane samachungechunge amane afana nesikhaliswa esisuselwe ku-Hawaii.
Imisindo yemishini yeselula ehambisa abantu noma imithwalo.
Umsindo wesisetshenziswa semoto injongo yayo ukunikeza isexwayiso esizwakalayo sobukhona bemoto.
Isisetshenziswa seyunithi yezinhlamvu esakhuni, ngokuvamile enamayunithi ezinhlamvu amane, edlalwa ngokugoba noma ngokushaya iyunithi yezinhlamvu.
Umculo udlalwa ngumculi oyedwa noma abaningi, ngezikhalisi noma ngaphandle kwazo.
Imisindo ebangelwa ukunyakaza kwamanzi, kufaka phakathi ukusakaza, ama-faucets, nemvula.
Inkulumo engenazwi, ngokuvamile ehloselwe ukuthula ukugwema ukubangela ukuphazamisa noma ukuya ekhanda.
Amathoni asheshayo akhiqizwe ngokuphuphutha noma ukudonsa umoya ngokuvuleka okuncane phakathi kwezindebe zomlomo. Kusetshenziselwe ukuthatha ukunaka noma ukukhiqiza isikhalisi.
Imisindo ebangelwa ukugeleza komoya ekusetheni kwangaphandle. Umoya onamandla ungenza ukubhala inkulumo kubenzima.
Thola isaziso uma izinto zakho zikagesi zikhala
Londoloza imisindo yemishini oyihlele ngokwesifiso sakho

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase idlidlize, ikhanyise ukukhanya kwekhamera, noma ikwazise ewashini elixhunyiwe."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase ikhanyise ukukhanya kwekhamera, noma ikwazise ewashini elixhunyiwe."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase futhi ikwazise ewashini elixhunyiwe."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase futhi idlidlize noma ikwazise ewashini elixhunyiwe."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase futhi idlidlize noma ikhanyise ukukhanya kwekhamera."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase futhi ikhanyise ukukhanya kwekhamera."

"Uzothola isaziso uma kutholwa umsindo.
Kuye ngamasethingi akho, idivayisi yakho ingase futhi idlidlize."

"Izaziso Zomsindo zikusiza waze ukuthi kwenzakalani ekhaya lakho.
Uma Izaziso Zomsindo zivuliwe, idivayisi yakho izohlala ihlola imisindo ofuna ukwaziswa ngayo, njengalapho kukhala i-alamu yentuthu noma ingane ikhala.
Izingxoxo ezilalelwayo nezingemuva azithunyelwa ku-Google, ngaphandle uma ukhetha ukuthumela impendulo mayelana nekhwalithi yomsindo."
Umsindo wengane encance ikhala noma iklabalasa.
Ithoni emfushane, eyodwa, ngokuvamile eyenziwe ikhompuyutha noma omunye umshini futhi ngokuvamile ephakeme.

Noma yimiphi imisindo eyenziwa inja yasekhaya ekhuliselwe ngokukhethekile izinkulungwane zeminyaka ngenjongo yobungane, ukuvikela, kanye namakhono wenzwa anamandla kakhulu, kanye nokunye ukuziphatha okuwusizo.
Umsindo wedivayisi obonisa idivayisi ebekwe eduzane nesango lesakhiwo lapho isivakashi singathula ubukhona baso.
Umsindo ocijile wendawo eqinile eshaywayo, ngokuvamile ngaphandle kokulimala ngenhloso, ikakhulukazi nge-knuckles yesandla.
Ukukhulumela phezulu ukukhuthaza ngamabomu ukunakwa noma ukulwisana nemisindo ephazamisayo. Akudingekile ukuthi kube ukuqonda okunomuzwa Wokuthethisa noma Ukuklabalasa.

Umsindo wedivayisi owenza umsindo ophezulu kakhulu osetshenziselwa ukunikeza izexwayiso kubantu abaseduze. Ngokuvamile i-siren inokuphama kokulodwa okushintshayo kube okupholile noma okuphezulu kakhulu ngokwehluka kwezikhathi phakathi nesekhondi eyodwa.
Umsindo wensimbi ephathekayo noma yogesi ehlelwe imiqondo ekhalayo ukuze ibonise ikholi yocingo engenayo.

"Ukuze uthole izaziso, kuzodingeka ukuthi ukhethe ukuthi yimiphi imisindo engakhipha okuthi Ungaphazamisi.
Iya kumasethingi wedivayisi bese uthepha kuhlobo lomsindo ngamunye ofuna ukwaziswa ngalo."
Kuzofakwa umsindo ofika emizuzwaneni engama-30. Lokhu kusiza ukuthuthukisa ukunemba kokutholwa komsindo.

Izaziso Zomsindo zikusiza waze ukuthi kwenzakalani ekhaya lakho.

Uma Izaziso Zomsindo zivuliwe, idivayisi yakho izohlala ihlola imisindo ofuna ukwaziswa ngayo, njengalapho kukhala i-alamu yentuthu noma ingane ikhala.

Izingxoxo ezilalelwayo nezingemuva azithunyelwa ku-Google, ngaphandle uma ukhetha ukuthumela impendulo mayelana nekhwalithi yomsindo.
Ayikwazi ukuthola imisindo. Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kuvinjiwe.
Ukuze isebenzise i-%1$s, i-app idinga ukufinyelela kumakrofoni nezaziso zale divayisi. Ungabuyekeza lokhu kumasethingi wedivayisi.
Khetha ukuthi ufuna idivayisi yakho idlidlize nesibani sekhamera sibanise nini
Isibani sekhamera yedivayisi yakho singakhanya uma le misindo itholwa
Idivayisi yakho ingadlidliza uma le misindo itholwa
Ukuze isebenzise i-%1$s, i-app idinga ukufinyelela ezazisweni. Ungabuyekeza lokhu kumasethingi wedivayisi.
Izaziso ziyama lapho idivayisi yakho iqala kabusha
Shaja idivayisi yakho ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa Izaziso Zomsindo
Olunye uhlelo lokusebenza lusebenzisa imakrofoni. Ukuze uqhubeke, zama ukuvala ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza.
Loba lokho okwenzakalayo ngemuva kokutholwa komsindo
Nikeza lo msindo igama elihlukile ukuze uwuhlukanise kwezinye izimpahla
Bona ukuthi kwenzekani uma idivayisi yakho iphawula umsindo ewaziyo
Yaziswa ngemisindo ebalulekile ekuzungezile, njengalapho kukhala i-alamu yentuthu noma lapho kukhala ingane

"Izingxoxo zomsindo nezingemuva azithunyelwa ku-Google, ngaphandle uma ukhetha ukuthumela impendulo mayelana nekhwalithi yomsindo.
Khumbula, Izaziso Zomsindo zingase zingakwazi ukuthola yonke imisindo."
Ukuze ulobe ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi, khetha ulimi olutholakalayo ukuze ulidawunilode
Sebenzisa isikrini esingaphandle ukuze ubonise okulotshiweyo nezimpendulo zakho ezithayiphiwe kwabanye

"Izaziso Zomsindo zikwazisa ngemisindo esekhaya lakho, njenge-alamu yentuthu noma insimbi yokuncencethwa emnyango.
Ukuze uvule Izaziso Zomsindo, iya Kumasethingi phansi esikrinini sakho."
Dawuniloda i-%s ukuze ulobe ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi

I-Live Transcribe ibonisa inkulumo njengombhalo kusikrini sakho ukuze ukwazi ukuhlanganyela ezingxoxweni ezikuzungezile kalula .

Ungathayipha izimpendulo kusikrini ngenkathi ubuke okulotshiweyo, uthole izexwayiso lapho kukhulunywa igama lakho, futhi useshe phakathi nokulotshiweyo.

I-Google icubungula izingxoxo zakho kodwa ayilokothi izigcine.
I-%s ayikwazi ukusebenzisa i-mic njengoba enye i-app iyisebenzisa
Ukuze isebenzise i-%1$s, i-app idinga ukufinyelela kumakrofoni yale divayisi. Ungabuyekeza lokhu kumasethingi wedivayisi.
Le mvume iyadingeka ukusebenzisa i-Live Transcribe ngamadivayisi we-Bluetooth. Ungavumela ukufinyelela noma kunini Kumasethingi wedivayisi.
Uhlelo lokusebenza aluxhunyiwe kwi-inthanethi. Zama ukuxhuma ku-Wi-Fi noma ukushintsha amanethiwekhi.

"I-app ayixhunyiwe kwi-inthanethi. Uzobona imicimbi yomsindo kodwa hhayi okulotshiwe.
Zama ukuxhuma ku-Wi-Fi noma ukushintsha amanethiwekhi."

"Okulotshiweyo kude kakhulu ukuba kukopishwe wonke umbhalo ngesikhathi esisodwa.
Ukuze ukopishe okusele, thola umbhalo ongakagqanyiswanga bese ukhetha konke futhi."
Ukubhala okungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi kunciphisa ukusetshenziswa kwedatha yeselula
Ukubhala ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi kusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi, ukuze uzokwazi ukubhala ngenkathi uhamba, phakathi nokuphela kukagesi, futhi nalapho unoxhumano olungalungile
Manje ungakwazi ukuncinza isikrini ukuze usondeze umbhalo

"Ungakwazi ukuvula i-Live Transcribe ngokushesha ngesinqamuleli sokufinyeleleka.
Kumasethingi, thepha %s bese uvula isinqamuleli."
Shintsha inkulumo ibe okubhalwe phansi ukwenze bukhoma
Umsindo uzosisiza siqonde izinkinga zokunemba lapho kulotshwa. Kuzofakwa imizuzwana yokugcina engama-60 yomsindo orekhodwe ngemakrofoni yedivayisi yakho.
Phumuza ukuloba ukuze ukwazi ukuqhubeka ufunde
Umbhalo wesegmenti osuselwe ekusebenzeni (esikhundleni sobude bombhalo)
Ifaka imisindo efana nokuhleka, ukushaywa kwezandla, nomculo
Ngokuloba okungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi, usengakwazi ukuloba ngaphandle kokuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi
Manje usungakwazi ukuloba ngaphandle kokuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi
Ngokuloba okungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi, usengakwazi ukuloba ngaphandle kokuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi Amagama angokwezifiso ngeke atholakale.
Dawuniloda izilimi ukuze ulobe ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi
Amasu ahlukene okwenza umbhalo obonisiwe uzinze kakhudlwana.
Swayipha ukuze ubone lapho ushiye khona

"Ngisho nangamehlo avikelwe ngezibuko eziluhlaza okotshani u-Dorothy nabangani bakhe babengabokuqala ngokuhlakanipha kwidolobhakazi elihle. Izitaladi zazigcwele izindlu ezinhle zonke zakhiwe ngokuluhlaza futhi zigcwele yonke indawo ngama-emeralds amahle. Babehamba ku-pavement yona leyo eluhlaza, futhi lapho amabhulogi ayehlangana khona imigqa ye-emeralds, asethwe ngokuseduze, nokuqhakaza ekukhanyeni kwelanga. Amapheni ewindi wayenezingilazi eziluhlaza; ngisho nesibhakabhaka ngenhla kwedolobhakazi sasiluhlaza, futhi imisebe yelanga yayiluhlaza.
Kwakunabantu abaningi, amadoda, abesifazane nezingane, bezihambela, futhi bonke babegqoke izinguzo eziluhlaza nezikhumba eziluhlaza. Babheka u-Dorothy nabangani bakhe ngamehlo okumangala, futhi zonke izingane zagijima emuva komama wazo uma bebona ibhubezi; kodwa akekho noyedwa owakhuluma nabo. Izitolo eziningi zama emgwaqweni, futhi u-Dorothy wabona ukuthi yonke into kuzo iluhlaza. I-candy eluhlaza i-popcorn eluhlaza zezithengiswa, kanye nezicathulo eziluhlaza, izigqoko eziluhlaza nezingubo eziluhlaza zazo zonke izinhlobo. Endaweni eyodwa indoda yayithengisa i-lemodane elulaza, futhi uma izingane ziyithenga u-Dorothy wabona ukuthi bayikhokhele ngemali elihlaza.
Kwakubonakala kunamahhashi hhayi izilwane zolunye uhlobo; indoda iphethe izinto ngekalishi eluhlaza, ebayiphushayo. Wonke umuntu wayebonakala ejabulile futhi ephulelele."
Umsindo utholiwe, kodwa okulotshiweyo akutholakali okwamanje. Zama futhi kamuva.
Ayikwazi ukuloba okwamanje. Izibuyekezo ziyaqhubeka. Zama futhi kamuva.
Umlando wokuloba uvuliwe. Ungashintsha lokhu noma nini kumasethingi e-Live Transcribe.
Inkinobho yokukhuluma ikhutshaziwe ngenxa yokungabi khona kombhalo
Inkinobho yokukhuluma ikhutshaziwe ngenxa yobude bombhalo.
Lolu limi luzosetshenziselwa ukufunda imiyalezo yakho ethayiphiwe ngokuzwakalayo. Ngeke kube nomthelela olimini lwakho oluyinhloko kuyo yonke i-app.
Khetha ulimi lwesibili kuqala. Bese ukhetha izwi lezimpendulo ezithayiphiwe
Lolu limi luzosetshenziselwa ukufunda imiyalezo yakho ethayiphiwe ngokuzwakalayo. Ngeke kube nomthelela olimini lwakho lwesibili kuyo yonke i-app.
Imilayezo ayikwazi ukufundwa ngokuzwakalayo kusi-%1$s esikhethiwe. Zama olunye ulimi.
Uma uthayipha impendulo kuLive Transcribe, umlayezo wakho ungafundwa ngokuzwakalayo ngaleli zwi
Ukubhala kumiswe ngenkathi impendulo ifundwa ngokuzwakalayo
Okulotshiwe kanye nezimpendulo ezithayiphiwe zizofihlwa ngaphandle kwesikrini
Okulotshiwe kanye nezimpendulo ezithayiphiwe zizoboniswa ngaphandle kwesikrini
Ifoni idlidliza uma othile ecala ukukhuluma ngemuva kokuma kwamasekhondi okungenani ayi-10
